info.title: profile_fields-administration
info.description: Structured custom profile data for directories, operations and support teams

get.description:
Return all profile field definitions ordered for admin management.
This endpoint requires admin access

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

post.description:
Create a new profile field definition for the instance.
This endpoint requires admin access

fieldKey.description: Immutable unique key of the field

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the UI

type.description: Value type accepted by the field

adminOnly.description: Whether only admins can edit values for this field

userEditable.description: Whether the owner can edit the field value

userVisible.description: Whether the owner can see the field in personal settings

initialVisibility.description: Initial visibility applied to new values

sortOrder.description: Display order used in admin and profile forms

active.description: Whether the definition is currently active

options.description: Allowed values for select fields (ignored for other types)

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

put.description:
Update a profile field definition without changing its immutable key.
This endpoint requires admin access

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the UI

type.description: Value type accepted by the field

adminOnly.description: Whether only admins can edit values for this field

userEditable.description: Whether the owner can edit the field value

userVisible.description: Whether the owner can see the field in personal settings

initialVisibility.description: Initial visibility applied to new values

sortOrder.description: Display order used in admin and profile forms

active.description: Whether the definition is currently active

options.description: Allowed values for select fields (ignored for other types)

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

delete.description:
Delete a profile field definition and return the removed record.
This endpoint requires admin access

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

get.summary: List stored values for a user
get.description:
Return all persisted profile field values for a specific user.
This endpoint requires admin access

parameters.name: userUid
parameters.description: User identifier whose profile field values should be listed

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

put.summary: Upsert a stored value for a user
put.description:
Create or update a profile field value for a specific user as an administrator.
This endpoint requires admin access

currentVisibility.description: Visibility to apply to the stored value

parameters.name: userUid
parameters.description: User identifier that owns the profile field value

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

post.summary: Lookup a user by a key profile field value
post.description:
Resolve a Nextcloud user from an exact profile field match, then return the user's stored profile fields keyed by field key. This is intended for ETL or payroll-style integrations that know one authoritative identifier such as CPF and need the rest of the cooperative data.
This endpoint requires admin access

fieldKey.description: Immutable key of the lookup field, such as cpf

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

409.description: Multiple users match the lookup field value

404.description: Lookup field definition or user not found

get.summary: Search users by one profile field filter
get.description:
Return a paginated list of users that match one explicit profile field filter. The response includes only the field/value pair that produced the match, not the full profile.
This endpoint requires admin access

parameters.name: fieldKey
parameters.description: Immutable key of the field to filter by

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value payload to compare against the stored field value

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of users to return in the current page

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Zero-based offset into the matched result set

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

400.description: Invalid search filter or pagination values
